description: 潮流感强，视觉冲击力大。字体大小对比(10:1)是核心——标题占据50%画面。
base_style_prompt: Neo-Pop magazine style with bold typography, high contrast colors, and modern aesthetic. Large title typography dominates the composition (10:1 size ratio). Color blocks provide visual organization. Avoid rendering actual typography as text (use visual representation instead). Contemporary pop culture influence with digital-native energy.
key_principles: 色块分区帮助信息组织
